stemHtml: Which one of the following statements regarding the intertropical convergence zone (ITCZ) is correct?

options.a: Frequent and widespread thunderstorms are to be expected within the area of the ITCZ.
options.b: The ITCZ is always associated with a strong jet stream.
options.c: The ITCZ does not change its position during the course of the year.
options.d: Thunderstorms seldom occur within the area of the ITCZ.
